title: La Paz High-Altitude Final
subtitle: SLLP 28 · ~10 NM final · A330 · 60G72 right-rear wind · 13,300 ft
description: High-altitude approach into El Alto (La Paz). Spawn, attitude, IAS, and time of day come from a real MSFS autosave on SLLP 28. Surface wind is 60 kt gusting 72 from the right-rear (~33° quartering tailwind): ~50 kt tail + ~33 kt right cross, with nasty gust spikes — harder energy and crab management. Aircraft config matches Barcelona: gear up, flaps clean, spoilers in. Start/Restart leaves the sim paused after settle — unpause when ready.
hudTips: Start free flight in A330-200 (RR) first — Challenge Lab will not hot-swap aircraft.
After Start/Restart you stay PAUSED at spawn — press GO on the HUD when ready to fly.
Start config: gear up, flaps 0, spoilers in, parking brake off. Set landing flaps on approach.
SLLP is ~13,300 ft elev — expect high TAS, long float, and reduced engine performance.
Wind 060/60G72: right-rear ~33° quartering (~50 kt tail + ~33 kt right cross). Gusts spike energy — watch float and crab.
Edit spawn / timeOfDay / weather in this JSON, then restart the challenge.
